publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-02-08 23:19:06 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Photographs, scrapbooks, correspondence, and news clippings.
did.abstract: Photographs of Gannett's relatives, and several small photo albums of Dixon Gannett as a child; a scrapbook relating to him and other family members; and loose clippings.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Photographs of Gannett's relatives, including his parents, Frank and Caroline Werner Gannett; his wife, Jean, and their children; Gannett's aunts and uncles; his sister, Sally Gannett McAdam and her family; Gannett employees and friends, including pilot Russell Holderman; and photographs of Gannett airplanes, their yacht (the Widgeon), family gatherings, and public events. Also, several small photo albums of Dixon Gannett as a child; a scrapbook of letters, telegrams, programs, and newspaper clippings relating to him and other family members; and loose clippings concerning the marriage of Dixon and Jean, and Frank Gannett's death.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Dixon Gannett. Papers, #4370. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Photo collection - has been coded. 1. "KEEP" - Cornell may keep as is or may return to Dixon Gannett. 2. "COPY and RETURN" - Cornell may copy before returning the original. In some cases, the original may be kept and the copy returned. 3. "EXCELLENT" - this photo is either in excellent condition or is of excellent value to Cornell archives. 4. "GOOD" - the photo is of good quality but not excellent. 5. "CRACKED" - the emulsion on this photo has been cracked but is other wise in good condition. 6. "LARGE" -these photos are larger than 8X10. 7. "BOOK" - mostly soft covered, any size. 8. "BOOKLET" - judged smaller than above book. 9. "PAMPHLET" and "FOLDER" are self explanatory.

unittitle.extref: Link to a PDF finding aid.

scopecontent.p: Folder - by Paul Miller

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Superb and in color: CWG portrait by Varden

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copy & Return - Shown with Mr and Mrs Alfred E. Stradling of England who stood in for Dixon's parents at his request.

did.unittitle: Dixon and NBC Anchorman John Chancelor

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - At the First delayed shuttle (STS-1) launch at Cape Kennedy

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copy & Return - (Slide) He and Jean enjoyed camping.

did.unittitle: Dixon with Vince Spezzano and ex-Gov. Bob Graham of Florida

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copy & Return - Envelope of photos and negatives - Location: press site of Cape Kennedy, I think one of the negatives shows John Denver.

did.unittitle: Dixon and Jean with their first grandchild

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copy & Return - grandchild is son of Frank E. Gannett II, Bryce Gannett.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Photo by Dixon

did.unittitle: Photo of FEG II and wife Claudine with first born, Bryce

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copy and Return - (This item was not marked by Cornell)

did.unittitle: Photo of Karen and Frank Gannett

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copy & Return - Children of Dixon and Jean Gannett

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Excellent 8x10's with negatives - contains 10 photos

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Hawley Ward (left); CWG (standing); Mrs Douglas Townsend (seated); Nora Peterson (standing); FEG (seated); Fred Knowling (standing); Douglas Townsend (seated)

did.unittitle: FEG (left), Dr. John R. Williams Sr. (right)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Bass fishing near the Widgeon in Canada

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - by Locheed

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Excellent photo of FEG

did.unittitle: House Staff locale unknown, possibly in Miami

scopecontent.p: Keep - Beach, Fred Knowling, (maid unknown)), Nora Peterson, Elizabeth Short

did.unittitle: John R. Williams Sr. with fish

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Excellent photo

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - (A super photo of FEG)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - At breakfast table and Fred Knowling

did.unittitle: FEG and John R. Williams Sr.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - tea on Widgeon (steward unknown)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - a good photo

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Air shot of Gannett Locheed

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Air shot of Gannett Locheed

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - I believe this made history: the first time ever that a family of three received diplomas at the same time from the same university. Dixon - BA degree; FEG - Doctor of Journalism; CWG - I remember only that this was for "Humanities"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Picture of 1st Gannett Stinson purchased through Russ Holderman. (I know it was pre 1941 because another Stinson which followed this one was a 1941 vintage. Holderman would not work for FEG unless he retained his company "Holderman Air Service". He sold Stinson aircraft.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: envelope contains 17 photos

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Russell Holderman and unknown co-pilot at the Bottsford Inn (Michigan) for dinner during a visit by CWG to Dixon and Jean.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Dixon (driving bulldozer with passenger) - a demonstration at the Ford Tractor School in England.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - "The Gannett Youth Barn" in Rochester. Dixon, Nora Peterson and Isaac VerHule, who used to be the Gannett chauffeur.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Dixon and Jean - an afternoon ride in Canada from Dearborn, Michigan

did.unittitle: Russ Holderman, Jean Gannett, Dorothy and Dixon

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copy and Return - Russ Holderman - chief pilot for Gannett, Jean Gannett pregnant with FEG II, Dorothy (Dot) Holderman and Dixon

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Excellent photo - Arthur Whittemore and Jack Lowe - dual pianists who CWG loaned $1,000 to complete their studies at Eastman School of Music.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Excellent photo - FEG and Dixon beside first Gannett Stinson aircraft.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Excellent photo - Dixon sitting on Gannett Stinson aircraft.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Excellent photo - First Gannett Stinson with the Gannett name painted on the side.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Good photo - FEG and Dixon at Dixon's desk in his room at 195 in Rochester

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Excellent photo - Lilly B. Werner (CWG's mother), FEG, Dixon and Sally, in 195 living room.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Excellent photo - FEG with Dixon - front steps of 195.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Excellent photo - FEG at his desk at 195.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Excellent photo - FEG in swimming pool at Indian Creek Club at Miami Beach, Florida.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Good photo - FEG with (I believe) Tim McAdam, Sally's first born.

did.unittitle: Dixon and Jean with Bunny and Dick

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Excellent photo - Dixon and Jean with Bunny and Dick , Doty in Bradenton, Florida. Doty was originally with WHAM radio in Rochester, N.Y.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep if you wish - Four photos of Dixon at the Ford Service Training School in Dagenham, England.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copy and Return - Dixon and Jean shortly after wedding.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Excellent photo - FEG with CWG

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Excellent photo but cracked - FEG, Paul Miller and unknown man.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Excellent large Photo - FEG and child (probably one of Sally's)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Excellent and large Photo - FEG with same child as photo # 20 (black and white)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Excellent and large Photo - FEG with same child as photo # 20 but in sepia

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Dixon at Miami Beach home.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Excellent and large Photo - Pan American flight. This may have been the inaugural trans-Atlantic service.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Excellent and large Photo - nose of Gannett Locheed

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Excellent and large Photo - Early Photos of Lilly B. Werner by Joseph Scheff of Rochester.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Superb portrait of FEG by Joseph Karsh. (This is a copy)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Superb portrait of CWG by Joseph Karsh. Supposed to be the finest picture taken of CWG ever. (This is a copy)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - (Slides) - Miscellaneous shots of the Miami Beach house.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copy and Return - Dixon and Jean taken in England at wedding.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Dixon's Promotion Certificate

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Newspaper clipping - FEG's death (condition very good but turning color with age)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Newspaper clippings: Dixon-Jean Gannett wedding. (article is typical English journalism - more dramatic than factual. Embarrassing.)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Newspaper clipping: "Clayla Ward Leaves $2.9 million"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Superb photo with original slide of FEG and his sister, Gracia Rathbone.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Leonard and Lilian Ryland - parents of Jean Gannett; 3rd from left - unknown; Cyril Williams - ex-treasurer of Gannett Co.; FEG II - son of Dixon and Jean; Bernice Williams - wife of Cyril Williams; Dixon Gannett; woman on right - unknown; Karen Gannett - daughter of Dixon and Jean; CWG; Jean Gannett

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - The same people but seated. The pictures were taken at the Colony Hotel in Palm Beach, Florida

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - photo of Dixon with dog

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Five bound photos of Dixon as a child. 1 red - large; 1 red - small; 3 dark blue; all with gold trim.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Photo of CWG with child of daughter Sally Gannett McAdam.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Photo of Gannett Stinson Tri-motor airplane and chief pilot, Russell Holderman signed by Holderman to Dixon Gannett.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - early photo of Dixon - small gold frame

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - advice to FEG by Maria Brooks Gannett

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Keep - Large photo album of photos taken by chief pilot, Russell Holderman, from Gannett plane.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Note: Lucia Gumaer has some FEG campaign buttons and an FEG smoking jacket (though FEG never smoked). Contact Dixon Gannett if interested.
